extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE attacked with FUGLSANG on the final gravel climb at Santa Caterina, dropped him inside 300m, soloing to victory ahead of FUGLSANG and VAN AERT.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT bridged solo from peloton to two-man break with 36km remaining, demonstrating unexpected gravel diesel capacity.
FUGLSANG attacked on Santa Caterina penultimate climb, immediately gapping VAN AERT but unable to sustain against ALAPHILIPPE's counter.
ALAPHILIPPE delayed final attack until final 300m technical section, neutralizing FUGLSANG's earlier forcing without wasting energy.
ROSA breakaway neutralized before critical sector entry, showing Sky unable to sustain climber advantage on gravel positioning.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: first Strade participation yielded dominant victory, confirming gravel climbing ability translates from Ardennes puncheur profile
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: second place shows climbing diesel on gravel, attacked decisively but lacked final 300m punch against pure puncheur
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: bridged 36km solo effort to leaders shows remarkable gravel endurance, podium finish despite fading on final climb
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: fourth place confirms Quick-Step gravel depth, suggests support rider elevation potential in similar races
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: fifth repeats 2018 podium consistency, reliable gravel performer lacking only winning acceleration
rider_signals.ROSA Diego: negative: Sky climber breakaway caught before critical sectors, indicating pure climbing insufficient without gravel-specific positioning skills
